import React from 'react'; import './About.css'; const About = () => { return (

About Me

Get to know me better - my journey, passion, and what drives me to create amazing digital experiences.

Who I Am

I'm Sarthak, a passionate full-stack developer who believes in the power of technology to transform ideas into reality. With a unique blend of technical expertise and creative vision, I create solutions that not only work flawlessly but also inspire and engage users.

My Journey

My journey in technology began with curiosity and has evolved into a deep passion for innovation. From my first line of code to complex full-stack solutions, every project has been a learning experience that pushes me to grow and improve my skills.

What I Do

I specialize in full-stack development, modern web technologies, and building scalable applications. Whether it's creating responsive web apps, developing backend APIs, or implementing cutting-edge features, I approach each project with creativity and technical precision.

🎨
Creative & Technical
3+

); }; export default About;
